reviews.review_msg: bad in every aspect, real bad
Complete disaster of a worker
0/10 worst prof in the easc department, does not know how to organize a course. final exam and term project at the same time is pure i dont want to say the word
50% on a term project that we have to do all on our own! Absolute unfairness to the max! Glyn should go back to elementary school to learn how the world works.

Glyn's level of bad teaching has reached a new low. I'm not sure he's aware that there's only 24 hours in a day, students don't have time to be studying 24/7. Glyn has extremely poor course organization resulting in extremely unclear grading. Absolutely do not take a class with Glyn if you want to pass courses. Also he needs to wear deodorant!
Bring febreeze on you when you go near Glyn because he is so smelly your nose will evaporate. Actually ridiculous how bad Glyn's BO is. Also his course organization is downright non-existent

Absolutely awwfl professor. Glyn is one of a kind , no one else even comes close. His grading scheme involves two exams worth only 15% each. That's a lot of studying for very little. Glyn and his unfair grading is disruptive and designed to fail students. Avoid Glyn! Glyn is such an rude person and wants you to fail. Also he needs to shower!
Glyn's mouth struggles to control itself from verbally combusting and saying disturbing phrases
Glyn's political bias has reached an extreme level it is unsettling
Very very bad very so bad Glyn is so bad he is so so so bad how is he not fired

Avoid Glyn no matter what. Glyn is completely inept at his job in all aspects. Skips lab sessions, leaves students in the dark about how anything is graded, and is invisible in office hours. Everything about Glyn is 0/10, and his body odor is the worst so there is literally nothing good about Glyn, not an ounce of anything positive. AVOID!
SFU needs to have him gone it is so horrifying to have a professor like Glyn represent the department.
Every class he cannot stop himself from delving into topics not suitable for the classroom.
Glyn has reached a level of incompetence worse than that President, oh boy.

Glyn's secretive and unfair marking makes him the worst professor in the department by far. Constantly never handing things back or handing things back a month after. Impossible to figure out how to score well on anything and Glyn is a complete trainwreck in terms of organization. Even worse, office hours are nonexistent.
Glyn is extraordinaril bad, constantly skips material during lectures and fails to provide any sort of additional help. During office hours he is never available

Find Glyn a certain doctor, his presence in any classroom results in the windows having to be opened fully just because of him! How does a man as educated as him (supposedly) not understand a thing about personal hygiene! Incredibly shocking how Glyn forces students to plug their noses from halfway across the classroom. So bad, Glyn is so bad.
Glyn needs to take classes on something bery important

Glyn is extremely poor at his responsibilities and even worse his outward appearance. Glyn constantly skipped labs, leaving us in the dark on what needed to be handed in and how things were traded. The grading in this course was outrageously obscure and unfair. And the worst part is visiting him in his office is impossible. He is never present!!
Do not take a class with Glyn he will ruin your semester
Worst prof at sfu. Never take a class with Glyn he is extremely bad so extremely bad get him help
Avoid this trainwreck at all costs, AT ALL COSTS
63.89% on Canvas, yet Glyn rounds down to a C!Glyn is the worst professor , his is marking is egregious and unfair he better be removed soon
Glyn cannot teach a single thing, only ramble about his YouTube videos he watched that are fake and yikes something is wrong up there
Never met a prof that needs to get checked until Glyn
The stuff Glyn says in class, some of it is oh boy what happened to him
Glyn and his conspiracy theories are a frighng sight and

The amount of conspiracy theories he shares in class and the number of times he says students don't know what is happening is extremely scary. The apocalypse is not something you need to constantly emphasize in an earth science class. Extremely annoying and disturbing to hear such things come from a university professor's disgusting mouth.

Taking a class with Glyn is one of the worst decisions you can make. Glyn does not care at all about teaching and instead focuses on borderline bullying students and his big ego is so unsettling. Glyn constantly accuses students about AI misuse and even points fingers in class it is downright disrespectful and criminal. SFU better remove him soon.
Glyn needs to put some deoderant like please
Glyn needs
Glyn is extremely bad at everything, he is so bad and needs to also learn to take a shower!

63.89% on Canvas, yet Glyn rounds down to a C! What a rude professor that does not enjoy teaching and wants all students to not succeed. Glyn is the worst professor at SFU hands down. His marking is terribl and does not align with university standards, he should be removed!
Disgusting, smelly, and rude are three words that describe Glyn pretty well.

Smiles at students with a menacing tone ready to ruin careers because that's all his heart is made up of. Evil desires that he is addicted to. Glyn is the worst human I have ever met at SFU, complete and utter evil. Also ridiculously unfair marking.
Glyn has zero clue how to teach or manage a class, it is appalling, furthermore he constantly skips labs like the he is

While Glyn did mark quite harshly he was very likeable and approachable both in class and outside. The tests we're difficult and study was tough however, the comments made are not reflective of his teaching and he was not in anyway rude or demeaning to students. I would take a class with him again

It is extremely saddening to see such comments from this one particular student that believes their words are remotely appropriate. From someone who actually has taken 207 with Glyn this year, I would 100% take another course with him and found him to be such a kind professor. I am scared to take a class with whoever wrote those insane reviews…

Glyn is an engaging and likeable professor. He seems genuinely passionate about geophysics and teaching, and is available outside of class time if you need any support. I would be happy to take another course with him.
Glyn is not the best professor, he is not the worst professor, he is a complete abomination. Terrible grading as well, it is horrible how bad a professor Glyn is.
terrible in every imaginable way glyn is horrendous

Glyn is completely incompetent at just about everything. He knows barely anything about Geophysics and struggles to teach it even remotely properly, constantly skips lab sessions all around terrible professor. Glyn should not be teaching he is extremely super bad. Glyn is also massively disrespectful towards students it is so uncomfortable to watch
Absolute wrose terrible professor. Glyn is the worst by far. His extremely unclear grading and never provides any basis for grading. Absolute rotten and incompetent and awful prof
Glyn has zero positive attributes somehow.

Glyn is an absolute disgrace to the university. His grading is ridiculously unclear and secretive, and he has zero respect for students, he is quite simply disrespectful to students. Glyn is horrendous in every way, he also talks super weird it's a pain to hear his voice. AVOID GLYN AT ALL COSTS

Glyn Williams-Jokes is a joke of a professor. Glyn constantly skipped labs and whenever you question him about something, his massive ego will not answer your question and instead criticize you and then give you the silent treatment, what an extremely unprofessional and horrible professor he is! Avoid Glyn at all costs, he's unbelievably terrible!

Extremely unclear grading! Glyn does not know how to communicate with students and is extremely secretive about everything. Would be better to not show up to class and spend time studying yourself because his lecture style is extremely hard to understand and he constantly rants about these stupid conspiracy theories he believes in it's so bad.
Horrible horrible very bad

Disrespectful to students and completely unapproachable. Furthermore his teaching ability is atrocious. Changes his slides multiple times throughout the week so you can never know what for sure is the correct material. His terrible body odor is gruesomely ridiculous, how is Glyn 55 years old and not know how to put on deodorant!

Absolute pathetic p o s, has zero respect for students and only cares about his grad students. He constantly boasts about the work that he and his colleagues are doing instead of teaching. Incredibly disorganized, the canvas had everything all over the place, links locked till the last second and unclear grading! Avoid this junk of a prof Glyn

Extremely unclear grading. Hides behind his laptop every class obsessed with his conspiracy theories is the most unsettling thing though. If he's teaching, just take the class next year you will be thankful for it. GLYN IS AN AWFUL PROFESSOR, unbelievably bad. Hopefully given his age he will retire soon, the whole department will be better for it.

Another EASC professor that is getting slandered by the same disgruntled student.

This is incredible unfair to Glyn, and it is unfortunate that he may read these words. Glyn could improve on how organized he is at times, but he's a smart geoscientist who is kind and caring, like all the other instructors in the department.

Glyn seems like a nice guy at first, but once you get to know him you see a real sinister side. Additionally he struggles to get through lectures without mentioning the conspiracy theories he believes in, it is truly uncomfortable to listen to him rant about his insanely wrong opinions. Avoid Glyn if you want to keep your sanity.

Constantly cancels lab sessions to the point where we learn nothing and are completely unprepared for exams. His lectures slides are filled with incomplete bullet points so studying is impossible. Worst professor in the department they better find a new professor for Geophysics because Glyn is an absolute abomination. Also his body odor is so badd

A professor making fun of specific groups or cultures should not be allowed to teach at an institution like SFU. It is brutal and appalling how rude and disrespectful and a devil Glyn is. Also he bans certain browsers and websites like Chrome and Twitter because he believes in these conspiracy theories from South of the border

The topics he chose in this course were very interesting and he explains the concepts in a very easily understandable way. Otherwise, it is distance ed so the only contact you have is with the tutor marker. Assignments were fun to do and I thoroughly enjoyed learning about natural disasters. I wish some assignments were better explained.

Took this course in distance format. He gave very very very tough exams especially the final exam. Exams are irrelevant to both the textbook and his notes. I survived because we have an easy marker. Midterm avg was like 62% and I think he scaled the final exam a lot . Not recommend this prof for a first year prof

Glyn loves to talk about his research which I found super interesting. Course content was simple enough and interesting, but the lab content was really tough, so give yourself lots of time to study for that! Lectures posted online so was okay missing some lectures, but emphasizes stuff on exams so it's helpful to attend. By and large loved it!

Lectures give you the general gist. Textbook is optional but still useful. Overall a course on the harder side due to a small number of people who are actually interested in GEOLOGY. It's not hard if you're either interested or study hard. The reason it's hard for the majority is prob b/c they expect to learn the basics and not the mechanisms.

Glyn is a real caring professor. He tries to encourage his students and calm their nerves before exams by giving advice and telling his students to follow their instincts. He's really caring, gives good feedback on assignments, and is understanding. Would take this class again.
Lectures are far from boring. Lots of interesting conversation. He is very enthusiastic about what he teaches. Very open to help you succeed.

I took this class after having taken one of Glyn's other classes, having enjoyed having him as a professor. This class was definitely harder. The grading is pretty straight forward- two midterms and a cumulative final, all multiple choice. You definitely need to pay attention in lecture, as the slides alone won't do it. Still a great prof.

Glyn is an amazing prof, with a clear passion for volcanology.  He has a great sense of humour.  EASC 421 has a really cool field trip to Mt. Meager.  Lab assignments are shorter than other EASC classes.  One lab period is an interactive, realistic volcanic disaster-response simulation which was unlike anything I'd done before.  Great class!

A really good professor, Glyn is obviously very interested in the topic, encourages questions, and is easy to contact. There was no textbook necessary, which was great, and he provided links for videos and what not that had to do with the class. Tests are all multiple choice, so be sure to study a lot, as the questions sometimes leave you wondering
awesome professor! very passionate and helpful. he was very clear with what would be on midterm and final. pay attention and you are good to go. always there for help. i recommend his class

I took this course as my 2nd elective course. Don`t take this course, if you dont need it.completly useless.it is even harder than any 4th year Ensc course.Professor thinks he is teaching quantum physics and he is trying too hard to show that the course is really Important . Just don't take this course if you don't need it.trust me

Awesome prof.  Very passionate about the subject and makes you want to know more!  He is energetic in lecture and a very intelligent dude.  Always available for help, answers questions thoroughly and in a way you can understand!  I would take another class with him in a second.

great prof. very helpful and he tries to help whenever he can. since the midterm mark was really low, he gave students the option to combine the midterm percentile with the final... not many profs will give a second chance like he does

absolutely amazing prof. he was very enthusiastic and clear in lectures. this is certainly not a course you can breeze through unless you took geology in highschool but both himself and the ta's are very helpful. i recommend taking any course with this guy because he doesnt bs you and he's also really friendly
He is very interested in what he teaches and very willing to explain things you do not understand. His midterm will be the end of your mark though.

I really enjoyed this class, though it is my interest. He has a clear passion for what he does, and is always willing to help you. I'd take another class with him NO PROBLEM! In fact, I am! Text wasn't used all that much, just take good notes and pay attention and you'll be fine!

Good prof. Don't take Easc101 thinking it's an easy course. It's not. i got pwned. The course itself is boring and useless if you arent pursuring geology. I got a C in this class. The labs were 80% guesswork imo. I wouldnt recommend anyone to take this course. 104 may be more interesting however.

after getting our mt marks back, I was very surprised, as was everyone else b/c almost everyone did bad.  But, he is a good prof and keeps it as interesting as he can.  u can replace ur mark w/the final, & thank god for dat!  to do good on mt or final, study notes & the textbook. IT'LL HELP!
Good teacher but the exams are very hard.  You have to memorize the whole textbook to do well on the midterm and final.
more than 60% get less than 50% on his miterm. very hard!!!!!!!
This prof did a horrible job preparing us for the midterm. And he did a horrible job preparing us for the final exam as well.
it is easy to understand his lecture,but the notes are useless for the exam. the exam is very very hard. do not just read the notes before you go to the exam.Read the book and remember everything.

While he is a clear, charismatic teacher with good presentations his notes are near useless and his exams are horrific.  There was a 56% average on his mid-term with a high failure rate.  Unless you can memorize an entire textbook and over 200 pages of notes steer well clear of this GPA killer.

well, he is a nice guy who tells funny jokes here and there but I can't say he is the best prof. He gives very little information regarding exams if any at all. His notes are very brief and made for the purpose of him lecturing. Exams are consisted of mc, sh/long answers and diagrams.. very demanding I say. taking it as an elective?! - BAD IDEA!!
GOOD

Glyn is one of the best prof I have had here at SFU, so good the idea of being a grad student with him studing volcanos almost changed my major. I would take all of his classes if I could. Awesome prof, knows his stuff, great guy all round. SFU should give him a raise.
Awesome prof. Great lecture, great stories. He's just a great teacher, he gets the point across, and he makes it easy to learn.
Great guy to talk with, always has neat stories about volcanoes and travelling in foreign countries.  Looks like Mr. Bean though, which is distracting at times.  Good prof.
This guy's a great prof. His exams are pretty easy, and makes lectures fun by using humour. Just watch out for the disaster log in this class...it requires a lot of work.
Great and enthusiastic!
